Fixer for exec.
This converts usages of the exec statement into calls to a built-in
exec() function.
exec code in ns1, ns2 -> exec(code, ns1, ns2)
fixer_base)
Comma
Name
Callc
FixExecTzx
    exec_stmt< 'exec' a=any 'in' b=any [',' c=any] >
    |
    exec_stmt< 'exec' (not atom<'(' [any] ')'>) a=any >
    c
exec)
prefix)
syms
getZ
cloner
extendr
selfZ
nodeZ
resultsr
args
./usr/lib64/python3.9/lib2to3/fixes/fix_exec.py
	transform
FixExec.transformN)
__name__
__module__
__qualname__Z
BM_compatibleZ
PATTERNr

BaseFixr
